criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: The level of user interaction and activity within the app, measured by metrics such as daily active users, session duration, and retention rates.
criteria.sources: App analytics platforms, user reviews, and app store statistics.

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent and effectiveness of AI features integrated into the app, such as chatbots, recommendation systems, and content moderation.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, and technical analysis.

criteria.name: User Reviews and Ratings
criteria.description: The overall user satisfaction and feedback based on reviews and ratings on app stores.
criteria.sources: App store listings and third-party review platforms.

criteria.name: Innovation and Uniqueness
criteria.description: The originality and creativity of the app's features and design, setting it apart from competitors.
criteria.sources: Expert reviews, industry analysis, and user feedback.

criteria.name: Privacy and Security
criteria.description: The measures taken by the app to protect user data and ensure privacy, including encryption, data policies, and security features.
criteria.sources: App privacy policies, security audits, and user reviews.
